news_items.headline: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
news_items.description: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.

news_items.headline: Elon Musk’s bold move that could upend TSA workers’ pay standoff amid DHS shutdown
news_items.description: Elon Musk offered to cover the salaries of Transportation Security Administration (TSA) personnel during the ongoing government funding standoff.

news_items.headline: ‘Tax resistance’ gains attention amid ICE protests, Iran war — and IRS penalties could follow
news_items.description: Tax protesters often withhold taxes due to moral objections to certain government programs, such as the Iran war. But there can be IRS penalties, experts say.

news_items.headline: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
news_items.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

news_items.headline: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
news_items.description: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

news_items.headline: China vows to continue opening its economy amid U.S. trade tensions
news_items.description: China has reached a temporary truce with the U.S. on trade. The world's second-biggest economy reported a record $1.2 trillion trade surplus for 2025.

news_items.headline: Iran and Hezbollah launch new attacks on Israel as war also threatens power plants
news_items.description: The United States and Iran threatened to target critical infrastructure as the war in the Middle East, now in its fourth week, puts lives and livelihoods at risk throughout the region. Iran on Sunday warned it would close the Strait of Hormuz immediately if t…

news_items.headline: Oil prices are set to rise further as war in the Middle East escalates
news_items.description: Oil prices look set to rise on Monday after U.S. and ​Iranian trade threats to target energy facilities, analysts said.

news_items.headline: U.K. confirms Iran fired two missiles at British-American base in Indian Ocean which failed to reach their target
news_items.description: Iran fired the two missiles at the joint U.S.-U.K. Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean but they failed to reach their target, U.K. minister says.

news_items.headline: Government bonds face ‘perfect storm’ as Iran war rattles Europe's central banks
news_items.description: Bond yields have surged as Europe's central banks grapple with new inflation fears.

active_flags.title: Iran war, oil price surge worsen K-shaped economy, say economists
active_flags.context: Rising oil prices and the fallout of the U.S.-Iran war are worsening the economic divide, experts say.
